_comment: Fan-out across three direct providers in parallel, then consolidate. Run: omniforge run-dag examples/02-consensus-3-providers.json -w internal --auto-approve

tasks.name: In one objective sentence, evaluate ETag / If-None-Match as an HTTP caching strategy.
In one objective sentence, evaluate Cache-Control max-age as an HTTP caching strategy.
In one objective sentence, evaluate stale-while-revalidate as an HTTP caching strategy.
Consolidate the three HTTP-caching evaluations from the previous steps into a single short recommendation.
